overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime drive through a rain-soaked dystopian city. The journey begins in an industrial alley with massive digital billboards, continues through a graffiti-covered tunnel, and proceeds along a foggy highway lined with illuminated advertisements and concrete retaining walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial alley with overhead digital billboards

agents.ego_description: driving through a wet industrial alley toward a tunnel entrance, passing under large glowing digital billboards

entered.detail: massive illuminated billboard displaying food advertisements spanning the alley width
tall brick industrial building with metal fire escapes and glowing windows
dark concrete industrial structure with pipes and vents
dark tunnel opening at the end of the alley with overhead red lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow industrial alley at night, with wet asphalt reflecting the glow of massive digital billboards overhead. The camera moves forward toward a dark tunnel entrance flanked by industrial buildings, establishing the cyberpunk urban atmosphere.

events.description: entering covered tunnel from open industrial alley
approaching tunnel exit with increasing natural night light visible ahead

agents.ego_description: driving through the illuminated concrete tunnel with graffiti visible on the right wall

entered.detail: concrete ceiling with exposed beams and fluorescent lighting fixtures
smooth concrete wall with vertical paneling
graffiti-covered concrete wall with colorful tags and murals
row of overhead fluorescent light fixtures illuminating the tunnel

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered concrete tunnel, transitioning from the open alley to an enclosed space with artificial fluorescent lighting. The walls are covered in graffiti, and the tunnel exit becomes visible in the distance as the camera progresses forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with zebra crossing and overpass

events.description: exiting tunnel into open intersection with zebra crossing visible
turning left under the overpass structure onto the highway

agents.ego_description: exiting the tunnel and executing a left turn at the intersection, passing under a large overpass

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass bridge with metal support beams overhead
white striped pedestrian crosswalk on the wet asphalt
long continuous wall of multiple illuminated digital billboards
sloped concrete wall with yellow and black hazard stripes at the base

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the scene opens into a wide intersection with a zebra crossing. The camera turns left under a massive overpass structure, revealing a highway lined with continuous billboard walls on the left and a concrete retaining wall on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane highway with continuous billboard walls and graffiti-covered retaining walls

events.description: passing under overpass section temporarily blocking the sky view
passing a traffic light mounted on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along the foggy highway, passing rows of illuminated billboards and under occasional overpasses

entered.detail: tall street lamps with dual fixtures illuminating the foggy highway
vertical traffic signal with red lights visible

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the highway through the foggy night, with a continuous wall of glowing billboards on the left and a graffiti-covered concrete retaining wall on the right. The camera passes under overpasses and street lights, maintaining a steady pace through the dystopian urban landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a claustrophobic industrial alley into a sprawling, fog-shrouded highway. It begins by gliding over wet asphalt reflecting the glow of massive digital billboards before the camera enters a concrete tunnel where the open night sky is replaced by artificial fluorescent lighting and graffiti-covered walls. As the camera emerges from the tunnel, the scene opens into a wide intersection and turns left under a massive overpass, transitioning from the enclosed passage to an expansive urban artery. The journey finally extends along a highway lined with a continuous wall of glowing advertisements on one side and a concrete retaining wall on the other, passing under street lights and overpasses through the dense nighttime fog.
